/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/client_test.dir/src/LrpcApplication.cc.o CMakeFiles/client_test.dir/src/LrpcConfig.cc.o CMakeFiles/client_test.dir/src/LrpcProvider.cc.o CMakeFiles/client_test.dir/user/user.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/client_test.dir/src/zookeeperutil.cc.o CMakeFiles/client_test.dir/src/LrpcHeader.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/client_test.dir/src/LrpcChannel.cc.o CMakeFiles/client_test.dir/example/caller/LClient.cc.o CMakeFiles/client_test.dir/src/LrpcController.cc.o CMakeFiles/client_test.dir/src/LrpcLogger.cc.o -o client_test  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libprotobuf.so -lzookeeper_mt -lmuduo_net -lmuduo_base -lpthread
